title: Flamingo Quote
excerpt: I'm working in Florida helping a client organize years of photos and memories. While taking a little break and reading all the news about Instagram changing their logo, I decided to use the custom designed stamp set for Whim So…
body: I'm working in Florida helping a client organize years of photos and memories. While taking a little break and reading all the news about Instagram changing their logo, I decided to use the custom designed stamp set for Whim So Doodle (they take phone orders and are happy to ship) and stamp this flamingo. I played with Zig Clean Color markers for the first time and I am thinking I may have to finally take the plunge and get them. So in case you're in need, here is a good reminder...
